comment: This is generated by ESQL's AbstractFunctionTestCase. Do not edit it. See ../README.md for how to regenerate it.
name: st_simplifypreservetopology
description: Simplifies the input geometry by applying a topology-preserving variant of the Douglas-Peucker algorithm with a specified tolerance. Vertices that fall within the tolerance distance from the simplified shape are removed. Unlike `ST_SIMPLIFY`, the resulting geometry is guaranteed to be topologically valid.

params.name: geometry
params.description: Expression of type `geo_point`, `geo_shape`, `cartesian_point` or `cartesian_shape`. If `null`, the function returns `null`.

params.name: tolerance
params.description: Tolerance for the geometry simplification, in the units of the input SRS
